enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Credit Information Reporting ) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Information Reporting ) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect, unless otherwise
specified.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks [hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'Credit Institutions (CIs)' and individually referred to as
'Credit Institution (CI)'] as defined under Clause (ja) of Section 5 of the Banking
Regulation Act.
enriched_requirements.object: Rural Banks [hereinafter collectively referred to as 'Credit Institutions (CIs)' and individually referred to as 'Credit Ins

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'Company' means a company defined under section 3 of the Companies Act,
1956 or corresponding section under the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Company' means a company defined under section 3 of the Companies Act, 1956 or corresponding section und

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Credit Information Companies (CICs)' means companies that have been granted
a certificate of registration under section 5 of the CICRA.
enriched_requirements.object: granted a certificate of registration under section 5 of the CICRA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
TransUnion CIBIL Limited March 05, 2012
(3) 'Specified User (SU)' shall have the same meaning assigned to it under clause
enriched_requirements.object: assigned to it under clause

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Words or expressions used in these Directions and not defined herein, but
defined in CICRA, 2005, the Credit Information Companies Rules, 2006
(hereinafter referred to as 'CIC Rules') and the CIC Regulations, shall have the
same meanings as assigned to them in these Statute/ Rules/ Regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to them in these Statute/ Rules/ Regulations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any
other words or expressions used and not defined in these directions or aforesaid
Statute/ Rules/ Regulations and defined in Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Companies Act, 2013 shall have the same
meanings as assigned to them in these Acts.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to them in these Acts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A CI shall become member of all the CICs registered with the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: the CICs registered with the RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
One-time membership fee charged by the CICs from a CI to become their
members shall not exceed ₹10,000 each.
The annual fees charged by the CICs from a CI shall not exceed ₹5,000 each.

The reporting of credit information by a CI to the CICs, shall be undertaken in
standardised data formats as prescribed in Annex I.
enriched_requirements.object: data formats as prescribed in Annex I

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These standardised data
formats would be a non-proprietary reporting format and shall be known as
'Uniform Credit Reporting Format' (UCRF) as denoted below:
(1) Form 1: Uniform Credit Reporting Format (Consumer) - for consumer segment.
enriched_requirements.object: Credit Reporting Format' (UCRF) as denoted below: (1) Form 1: Uniform Credit Reporting Format (Consumer) - for consumer segment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall adhere to following guidelines on reporting timelines and updation:
(1) A CI shall submit data on credit information of its borrowers (including historical
data) to all CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: on reporting timelines and updation: (1) A CI shall submit data on credit information of its borrowers (including histo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 1A CI shall keep the credit information collected / maintained by it, updated
regularly on the following basis or at shorter intervals as mutually agreed upon
between the CI and CIC:
Explanation: Accounts with change only in days past due from the last reporting
reference date shall also form part of the reporting.
enriched_requirements.object: collected / maintained by it, updated regularly on the following basis or at shorter intervals as mutually agreed upon bet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A CI shall submit credit information as on 9th, 16th, 23rd and last day of the month
(hereinafter referred to as the reference dates) to CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: on 9th, 16th, 23rd and last day of the month (hereinafter referred to as the reference dates) to CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) A CI shall submit the full file containing credit information records as on the last
day of the month to the CICs, by 5th day of the next month.
enriched_requirements.object: containing credit information records as on the last day of the month to the CICs, by 5th day of the next month

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Full file for this purpose
shall include all active accounts in the books of the CI and the accounts wherein
relationship between the borrower and the CI has ended since the last reporting
reference date.
enriched_requirements.object: in the books of the CI and the accounts wherein relationship between the borrower and the CI has ended since the last repo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) For other submissions during the month, i.e., credit information records as on 9th,
16th and 23rd day of the month, a CI shall only furnish 'incremental accounts' to CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: to CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The CI shall submit such credit information to CICs within four (4) calendar days from
1 Substituted with effect from July 01, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Information Reporting) Amendment Directions, 2025 dated December 04, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: to CICs within four (4) calendar days from 1 Substituted with effect from July 01, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Re

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Incremental accounts for this purpose shall include details
in respect of the following accounts:
enriched_requirements.object: of the following accounts:

conditions:
where there is a change from the last reporting reference date
because of any action/ transaction initiated by the borrower
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(c) Accounts where there is a change from the last reporting reference date
because of any action/ transaction initiated by the borrower, and the same shall
include instances of repayment, change in outstanding balance, updates in
demographic details, related party, guarantors, ownership of account, account
type;
enriched_requirements.object: change in outstanding balance, updates in demographic details, related party, guarantors, ownership of account, accoun

conditions:
when reporting credit
information in the UCRF:
(1) In the commercial reporting segment
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall adhere to, inter alia, the following guidelines when reporting credit
information in the UCRF:
(1) In the commercial reporting segment, corporate identification number (CIN) and
credit history of the directors of the company (based on DIN number) shall be
<image>
reported.
enriched_requirements.object: the following guidelines when reporting credit information in the UCRF: (1) In the commercial reporting segment, corporate iden

conditions:
where compromise settlements have taken place and
the reason for such compromise settlement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A CI shall report cases where compromise settlements have taken place and
the reason for such compromise settlement, in the prescribed data formats to CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: settlements have taken place and the reason for such compromise settlement, in the prescribed data formats to CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) With respect to part instalment overdue, a CI shall submit data as it is, while
qualitative information on what filters to apply based on amount and period would be
done by the SU and others who make use of the data.
enriched_requirements.object: is, while qualitative information on what filters to apply based on amount and period would be done by the SU and others who make us

conditions:
where due to
financial inability to repay as per original terms and conditions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) A CI shall use 'settled' status for denoting only specific situations where due to
financial inability to repay as per original terms and conditions, either a principal or an
interest waiver or both is provided to the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: denoting only specific situations where due to financial inability to repay as per original terms and conditions, either a pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cases of wrong debits or contested charges shall not be reported
as 'settled' but as 'disputed'.
enriched_requirements.object: but as 'disputed'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The information on Commercial Papers (CPs) issued by the companies shall be
reported on a fortnightly basis to the CICs by a CI which has been designated as the
Issuing and Payment Agent (IPA) for the particular CP issue.
enriched_requirements.object: fortnightly basis to the CICs by a CI which has been designated as the Issuing and Payment Agent (IPA) for the particular CP issue

conditions:
If there are multiple
IPAs for a single CP issue
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If there are multiple
IPAs for a single CP issue, each IPA to such issue shall report to the CICs the details
pertaining to the portion of the issue which is with them.
enriched_requirements.object: the details pertaining to the portion of the issue which is with them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This information shall be
reported in the commercial data format in the fields as mentioned in Annex II.
enriched_requirements.object: commercial data format in the fields as mentioned in Annex II

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
IPA shall also report any default in the redemption of the relevant CP issue to the
CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: in the redemption of the relevant CP issue to the CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The information regarding Unhedged Foreign Currency Exposure (UFCE) of
individual borrowers shall be reported on a fortnightly basis to the CICs by the lending
CI (in the case of solo lenders) / consortium leader (in the case of consortium
arrangements) / largest lender (in the case of multiple lending arrangements).
enriched_requirements.object: fortnightly basis to the CICs by the lending CI (in the case of solo lenders) / consortium leader (in the case of consortium arrangem

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The cases admitted with National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) / National
Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy
Code, 2016 shall be reported under the suit-filed cases in the Uniform Credit
Reporting Format, while reporting to the CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: suit-filed cases in the Uniform Credit Reporting Format, while reporting to the CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Data of Self Help Group (SHG) members
(1) A CI financing SHGs shall report the SHG member level data to CICs in
the Uniform Credit Reporting Format (MFI) as mentioned in Annex I.
enriched_requirements.object: level data to CICs in the Uniform Credit Reporting Format (MFI) as mentioned in Annex I

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As indicated above, a CI shall collect
information from all SHG members in Tables 1 and 2 and report it to the CICs
as set out in Table 3.
enriched_requirements.object: SHG members in Tables 1 and 2 and report it to the CICs as set out in Table 3

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The SHG member level data as mentioned in Table 3 shall
be subsumed in Form 3: Uniform Credit Reporting format (MFI) of Annex I for
reporting to CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: 3: Uniform Credit Reporting format (MFI) of Annex I for reporting to CICs

conditions: In case of cancellation of licence of a CI by RBI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting mechanism after cancellation of licence
(1) In case of cancellation of licence of a CI by RBI, either through voluntary
submission or supervisory action, CICs shall insert a suitable disclaimer in the
records of the CI's borrowers to reflect non-updatability of the record due to
closure of the CI in their CIR.
enriched_requirements.object: in the records of the CI's borrowers to reflect non-updatability of the record due to closure of the CI in their CIR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In order to address the challenges in updating credit information of borrowers of
CI whose licence has been cancelled, CICs and CIs shall implement a credit
information reporting mechanism subsequent to cancellation of licence as under
enriched_requirements.object: reporting mechanism subsequent to cancellation of licence as under

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A CI, whose licence has been cancelled by RBI shall be categorised 'Credit
Institution' under Section 2(f)(vii) of CICRA.
enriched_requirements.object: under Section 2(f)(vii) of CICRA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Such a CI shall continue to report credit information of the borrowers on-
boarded and reported to CICs prior to cancellation of their licence to all the
four CICs till the loan lifecycle is completed or the credit institution is wound
up, whichever is earlier.
enriched_requirements.object: information of the borrowers on- boarded and reported to CICs prior to cancellation of their licence to all the four CICs ti

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Such a CI shall have access to Credit Information Reports pertaining to only
those borrowers which were onboarded and reported to CICs before the
cancellation of their license.
enriched_requirements.object: Information Reports pertaining to only those borrowers which were onboarded and reported to CICs before the cancellation of thei

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (iv) CICs shall not charge the annual and membership fees from such a CI.
enriched_requirements.object: membership fees from such a CI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) These instructions shall also be applicable to those entities whose licence
has been cancelled by the Reserve Bank of India prior to issuance of these
instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: those entities whose licence has been cancelled by the Reserve Bank of India prior to issuance of these instructions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) All other instructions regarding credit information reporting by CIs to CICs
shall remain unchanged
<image>

3A CI shall rectify the rejected data shared by CICs and re-submit the same to
CICs before / along with submission of data of subsequent reporting reference
date.
enriched_requirements.object: shared by CICs and re-submit the same to CICs before / along with submission of data of subsequent reporting reference date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CICs shall prepare and provide Data Quality Index (DQI) for Consumer,
Commercial and Microfinance segments, as provided in Reserve Bank of India
(Credit Information Companies) Directions, 2025, for assessing the quality of
data submissions by CIs to CICs and improving the same over a period of time.
enriched_requirements.object: Quality Index (DQI) for Consumer, Commercial and Microfinance segments, as provided in Reserve Bank of India (Credit Informat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall undertake half yearly review of the DQI for all segments to improve
the quality of the data being submitted to CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: of the DQI for all segments to improve the quality of the data being submitted to CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A report consisting of issues
identified and corrective steps taken shall be placed before its top management
by each CI for review within two months from the end of that half-year.
enriched_requirements.object: top management by each CI for review within two months from the end of that half-year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall abide by the time periods stipulated under CICRA and the Rules and
Regulations framed thereunder in respect of updation, alteration of credit
information, resolving disputes, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: periods stipulated under CICRA and the Rules and Regulations framed thereunder in respect of updation, alteration of credit informat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure prescribed under Rules 20 and
21 of the CIC Rules, 2006 in this regard shall be adhered to.

Deviations from
stipulated time limits shall be monitored and commented upon in the periodical
reports/reviews put up to the Board / Committee of Board on customer service.
enriched_requirements.object: upon in the periodical reports/reviews put up to the Board / Committee of Board on customer service

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall have arrangements in place to receive customer requests for
rectification of data in CIRs.
enriched_requirements.object: to receive customer requests for rectification of data in CIRs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to maintain high data quality, all
erroneous data shall be corrected at the source by the CI that originally
submitted the data.
enriched_requirements.object: source by the CI that originally submitted the data

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall include in their loan policies / credit appraisal processes, suitable
provisions for obtaining CIRs from one or more CICs so that the credit decisions
are based on credit information available in the system.
enriched_requirements.object: policies / credit appraisal processes, suitable provisions for obtaining CIRs from one or more CICs so that the credit decisions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI which is a secured creditor as per the Securitisation and Reconstruction of
Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest (SARFAESI) Act, 2002,
shall display, on its website, information in respect of the borrowers whose
secured assets have been taken into possession by the CIs under the
SARFAESI Act, 2002 as per the format given in Annex IV.
enriched_requirements.object: information in respect of the borrowers whose secured assets have been taken into possession by the CIs under the SARFAESI Ac

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The list consisting of
this information shall be updated on monthly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Secured assets possessed by a CI under the SARFAESI Act, 2002 on or
after September 25, 2023 should be disclosed on its website.
enriched_requirements.object: website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The secured assets possessed by a CI shall be removed from the website
in the event of the following circumstances:
enriched_requirements.object: website in the event of the following circumstances:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, a CI shall display information on secured assets
possessed under Section 13 (4) of the SARFAESI Act, 2002.
enriched_requirements.object: assets possessed under Section 13 (4) of the SARFAESI Act, 2002

conditions: in case of movable property
in case of immovable property
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) Both movable and immovable secured assets possessed under Section
13 (4) of the SARFAESI Act, 2002, on which the information is already
published in the newspapers in terms of Rule 3 (1) or Rule 6 (2) of the
Security (Enforcement) Rules of 2002 in case of movable property, and
Rule 8 (2) ibid in case of immovable property, shall be displayed on the
website of a CI.
enriched_requirements.object: website of a CI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) The 'outstanding amount' to be displayed on the website of a CI shall be
as per definition provided under Section 13 (9) (b) of the SARFAESI Act,
2002 i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: provided under Section 13 (9) (b) of the SARFAESI Act, 2002 i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
it shall include principal, interest and any other dues payable by
the borrower to the secured creditor in respect of secured asset as per the
books of account of the secured creditor.
enriched_requirements.object: any other dues payable by the borrower to the secured creditor in respect of secured asset as per the books of account

conditions: in case of movable property
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) The 'outstanding balance', 'asset classification' and 'date of asset
classification' of the secured assets possessed under Section 13 (4) of the
SARFAESI Act, 2002, shall be as per the information published in the
newspapers in terms of Rule 3 (1) or Rule 6 (2) of the Security
(Enforcement) Rules of 2002 in case of movable property, and Rule 8 (2)
in case of immovable property.
enriched_requirements.object: information published in the newspapers in terms of Rule 3 (1) or Rule 6 (2) of the Security (Enforcement) Rules of 2002 in case of mova

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Annex IV should be limited to guarantors who have created a security
interest in favour of the CI and whose assets are possessed under the Act.
enriched_requirements.object: who have created a security interest in favour of the CI and whose assets are possessed under the Act

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xi) While the lead lender as per the consortium agreement may initiate
SARFAESI proceedings, all consortium members are required to
individually display on their website the details of assets taken into
possession, including outstanding amount and other details as per the
pari-passu charge and consortium agreement ensuring transparency.
enriched_requirements.object: consortium members are required to individually display on their website the details of assets taken into possessio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall ensure compliance with the applicable instructions on credit
information reporting, as prescribed in the following Directions/ Circulars:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Cards and Debit Cards:
Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable instructions on credit information reporting, as prescribed in the following Directions/ Circulars: (1) Reserve

conditions: where necessary in the data formats
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to institutionalize a continuing mechanism for reviewing and making
changes where necessary in the data formats, a Technical Working Group
(TWG) shall be formed.

The TWG shall carry out the following functions:
(1) Review the data reporting formats, at least once a year, and make
recommendations, if any, to the Reserve Bank in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: functions: (1) Review the data reporting formats, at least once a year, and make recommendations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Any other matter relating to collection and dissemination of credit
information as the Reserve Bank may assign from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The TWG shall comprise of representatives from Public Sector Banks, Private
Sector Banks, Foreign Banks, Primary (Urban) Cooperative Banks (UCBs),
Regional Rural Banks (RRBs), All India Notified Financial Institutions (AIFIs),
Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs), Housing Finance Companies
(HFCs), Asset Reconstruction Companies (ARCs) India Banks' Association
(IBA), Micro Finance Institutions Network (MFIN), Sa-Dhan and CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: Public Sector Banks, Private Sector Banks, Foreign Banks, Primary (Urban) Cooperative Banks (UCBs), Regional Rural Ba

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Meetings of the TWG shall be held at least once in a calendar year.
enriched_requirements.object: once in a calendar year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The four
CICs shall act as convenor of the TWG by rotation (for each calendar year), in
alphabetical order of the name.
enriched_requirements.object: the TWG by rotation (for each calendar year), in alphabetical order of the name

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A Standing Sub-Group of TWG shall be constituted to function as an advisory
and collaborative body to offer expert insights and make recommendations on
technical aspects of credit information reporting.
enriched_requirements.object: as an advisory and collaborative body to offer expert insights and make recommendations on technical aspects of credit info

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This includes necessary modifications,
including changes in the IT systems, that may be required in the data reporting
formats.
enriched_requirements.object: data reporting formats

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Sub-Group shall work to support the broader TWG to ensure a
holistic approach to strengthening the credit information reporting ecosystem.
enriched_requirements.object: broader TWG to ensure a holistic approach to strengthening the credit information reporting ecosystem

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Members of the Sub-Group shall be selected by the convenor with prior
approval of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: convenor with prior approval of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To enhance the overall expertise and
effectiveness of the discussions, members of the Sub-Group shall nominate
subject matter experts to its meetings.
enriched_requirements.object: to its meetings

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Sub-Group of TWG shall meet at least on a half yearly basis to discuss
credit information reporting issues and seek potential resolutions.
enriched_requirements.object: a half yearly basis to discuss credit information reporting issues and seek potential resolutions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure effective coordination, the CIC that assumes the role of TWG
convenor for a specific year shall also act as convenor of the Sub-Group in that
particular calendar year.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Sub-Group in that particular calendar year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure proper preparation and informed discussions, the convenor shall
send the meeting agenda and notes at least fifteen (15) days before the
enriched_requirements.object: and notes at least fifteen (15) days before the

conditions:
if members desire to introduce a new issue or
item for discussion
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Additionally, if members desire to introduce a new issue or
item for discussion, they should send a note outlining the points of discussion
and proposed solutions to the convenor.
enriched_requirements.object: the points of discussion and proposed solutions to the convenor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Action points emanating from discussions of the Sub-Group shall contain
specific timelines required for their implementation by CICs and CIs.
enriched_requirements.object: for their implementation by CICs and CIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Recommendations of the Sub-Group of TWG shall be forwarded to the
Department of Regulation, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India for perusal.
enriched_requirements.object: Department of Regulation, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India for perusal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If
required, RBI may seek TWG's opinion on these recommendations.
enriched_requirements.object: these recommendations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to strengthen and improve the efficacy of the grievance redress
mechanism and customer service provided by the CIs, the following measures
shall be put in place by a CI:
(1) Updation of credit information with CICs
enriched_requirements.object: by a CI: (1) Updation of credit information with CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A CI shall send alerts through SMS / email to customers while submitting
information to CICs regarding default / days past due (DPD) in existing
credit facilities, wherever the mobile number/email ID details are available.
enriched_requirements.object: / email to customers while submitting information to CICs regarding default / days past due (DPD) in existing credit facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) A CI shall organize special awareness campaigns to sensitise its
customers about benefits of submission of their mobile numbers / email
IDs.
enriched_requirements.object: to sensitise its customers about benefits of submission of their mobile numbers / email IDs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A CI shall have a dedicated nodal point / official of contact for CICs for
redress of customer grievances.
enriched_requirements.object: point / official of contact for CICs for redress of customer grievances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Details of the nodal point / official along
with email ID and telephone / mobile number shall be furnished by the CI to
CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: CI to CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) A CI shall inform CICs of any changes in the nodal points / official within
five calendar days of such a change.
enriched_requirements.object: changes in the nodal points / official within five calendar days of such a change

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A CI shall inform the customers the reasons for the rejection of their request
for data correction, if any, to enable such customers to better understand
the issues in the CIR.
enriched_requirements.object: reasons for the rejection of their request for data correction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) A CI shall use the list of reasons for rejection of requests circulated by CICs,
while communicating the rejections of the request for data correction made
by customers / CICs during the grievance redress process.
enriched_requirements.object: reasons for rejection of requests circulated by CICs, while communicating the rejections of the request for data correction made by cu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A CI shall undertake Root Cause Analysis (RCA) of the customer
grievances at least on a half yearly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: (RCA) of the customer grievances at least on a half yearly basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CIs shall also use, inter alia,
information on data rejected by the CICs and DQI provided by CICs as
sources of information for carrying out RCA.
enriched_requirements.object: information on data rejected by the CICs and DQI provided by CICs as sources of information for carrying out RCA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The RCA shall be reviewed by the top management at least on an annual
basis.
enriched_requirements.object: top management at least on an annual basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall implement the following compensation mechanism for delayed
updation/ rectification of credit information:
(1) Complainants shall be entitled to a compensation of ₹100 per calendar day in
case their complaint is not resolved within a period of thirty calendar days from the
date of the initial filing of the complaint by the complainant with a CI / CIC.
enriched_requirements.object: mechanism for delayed updation/ rectification of credit information: (1) Complainants shall be entitled to a comp

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation:
Explanation: The delay of six days shall be apportioned by the CIs/CICs on
weighted average of the extent of delay by each CIs/CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: CIs/CICs on weighted average of the extent of delay by each CIs/CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the above case, the
overall delay is 6 days and therefore the complainant shall be entitled for total
compensation of ₹600.
enriched_requirements.object: compensation of ₹600

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the compensation
amount of ₹600 shall be apportioned on weighted average of the delay by each CIs
in relation to the overall delay of 32 days in this case.
enriched_requirements.object: average of the delay by each CIs in relation to the overall delay of 32 days in this case

conditions:
Where the grievance/ complaint involves inaccurate credit information of
more than one (1) CI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
 Bank A = No compensation
 Bank B = (5*600)/32 = ₹93.75
 Bank C= (7*600)/32 = ₹131.25
 Bank D = (9*600)/32 = ₹168.75
 Bank E = (11*600)/32 = ₹206.25
 CIC = No compensation
Note: Where the grievance/ complaint involves inaccurate credit information of
more than one (1) CI, the complaint shall be registered by the customer with the
concerned CIC.
enriched_requirements.object: customer with the concerned CIC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The CIC shall coordinate with all CIs concerned, and furnish to
the customer a comprehensive resolution of grievance.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned, and furnish to the customer a comprehensive resolution of grievance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Section 18 of CICRA, 2005 provides that for disputes arising
amongst, CICs, CIs, borrowers, and clients on matters relating to the
business of credit information and for which no remedy has been provided
under CICRA, 2005, such disputes shall be settled by conciliation or
arbitration as provided in the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996.
enriched_requirements.object: or arbitration as provided in the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI covered under the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021
(RBIOS, 2021) shall comply with the directions provided under the said
Scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: provided under the said Scheme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall take into account the best practices as detailed below, while
formulating or reviewing its policies and procedures under the CICRA with the
approval of their Board of Directors:
(1) Instances of non-updation of repayment information could be avoided by
centralising the issue of no objection certificates (NOCs) and providing
information to CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: best practices as detailed below, while formulating or reviewing its policies and procedures under the CICRA with the approval o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Customer grievance redressal should be given top priority especially in
respect of complaints relating to updation / alteration of credit information.
enriched_requirements.object: especially in respect of complaints relating to updation / alteration of credit information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Grievance redressal in respect of credit information should be integrated
with the existing systems for grievance redressal.
enriched_requirements.object: existing systems for grievance redressal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Aspects relating to
customer grievances pertaining to credit information may also be an integral
(4) A CI shall give full customer information to the CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: to the CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) First time borrowers' loan applications should not be rejected just because
they have no credit history.
enriched_requirements.object: they have no credit history

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CI shall have a
structured process of complaint redressal including the setting up of
Consumer Protection Committee of the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: of complaint redressal including the setting up of Consumer Protection Committee of the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal of these directions, instructions,
or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
i.
enriched_requirements.object: affect: i

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
